JOINT VENTURE AGREEMENT THIS JOINT VENTURE AGREEMENT (the "Agreement") made and entered into this 20th day of Friday, March 2020 (the "Execution Date"), BETWEEN: BorrowMoney.com, inc of 512 Bayshore DR, suite 201 Fort Lauderdale FL 33304, and JVLS, LLC dba Vaccines 2Go of 4060 Johns Creek Parkway Suite H Suwanee, GA 30024 (individually the "Member" and collectively the "Members"). clauses.concern: This clause establishes joint and several liability for each member, potentially exposing them to significant financial risk in case of a venture termination due to breach by another party.

clauses.title: 34. If a Member
clauses.text: If a Member is placed in bankruptcy, or withdraws voluntarily from the Venture, or if there is an Operation of Law against a Member, the other Members will be entitled to proceed as if the Member had breached this Agreement.
clauses.concern: This clause outlines joint and several liability for non-operator members in case of bankruptcy, withdrawal, or legal action against a member. This could expose the non-operator to significant financial risk.

clauses.title: 35. Distribution
clauses.text: Distribution of any amount owing to a dissociated Member will be made according to the percentage of ownership as described in the Valuation of Interest or as otherwise may be agreed in writing. Dissolution of the Joint Venture 36. The Venture will be dissolved and its assets liquidated in the event of any of the following: a. the Term expires and is not extended; b. a unanimous vote by the Members to dissolve the Venture; c. on satisfaction of the Purpose; d. loss or incapacity through any means of substantially all of the Venture's assets; or e. where only one Member remains.
clauses.concern: The clause lacks clarity on how capital calls are made and the mechanics for funding shortfalls, potentially leading to dilution of ownership and financial risks.

clauses.title: 38. On the
clauses.text: On the liquidation of the Venture assets, distribution of any amounts to Members will be made in proportion to their respective capital accounts or as otherwise may be agreed in writing. Valuation of Interest 39. In the absence of a written agreement setting a value, the value of the Venture will be determined based on the fair market value appraisal of all Venture assets (less liabilities) in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP) by an independent accounting firm agreed to by all Members. An appraiser will be appointed within a reasonable period of the date of withdrawal or dissolution. The results of the appraisal will be binding on all Members. A withdrawing Member's interest will be based on the proportion of their respective capital account less any outstanding liabilities a Member may have to the Venture. The intent of this section is to ensure the survival of the Venture despite the withdrawal of any individual Member.
clauses.concern: The clause lacks clarity on how capital contributions are handled and what constitutes 'necessary and expected costs' without further definition.

clauses.title: 40. No allowance
clauses.text: No allowance will be made for goodwill, trade name, patents or other intangible assets, except where those assets have been reflected on the Venture books immediately prior to valuation. Transfer of Member Interest 41. A Member may assign their proprietary assets and their rights in distribution interest in the Venture. Such assignment will only include that Member's economic rights and interests and will not include any other rights of that Member nor will it include an automatic admission as a Member of the Venture or the right to exercise any management or voting interests. A Member who assigns any or all of their Venture interest to any third party will relinquish their status as Member including all management and voting rights. Assignment of Member status, under this clause, including any management and voting interests, will require the consent of all the remaining Members.
clauses.concern: The clause states 'No allowance will be made for goodwill, trade name, patents or other intangible assets', which raises concerns about potential asset misalignment. This could lead to financial risk if the value of these assets is not properly reflected in the JV's accounting.

clauses.title: 46. This
clauses.text: 46. This section will survive for one year after the expiration or termination of this Agreement or dissolution of the Venture. Language 47. The Members expressly state that the English language is to be the language of choice for this Agreement and all other notices and agreements required by the Venture. Page 9 of 13
clauses.concern: Clause 46 states that the section will survive for one year after the expiration or termination of the agreement, which could create a significant risk if the JV is dissolved.

clauses.title: 56. If the
clauses.text: If the dispute is not resolved within a reasonable period then any or all outstanding issues may be submitted to mediation in accordance with any statutory rules of mediation. If mediation is not successful in resolving the entire dispute or is unavailable, any outstanding issues will be submitted to final and binding arbitration in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida. The arbitrator's award will be final, and judgment may be entered upon it by any court having jurisdiction within the State of Florida.
clauses.concern: The clause lacks clarity on how capital calls will be made and the mechanics for funding shortfalls.

clauses.title: 58. Each Member
clauses.text: This Venture is termed a contractual joint venture and will not constitute a partnership. Members will provide services to one another on an arms' length basis while remaining independent business entities. There will be no pooling of profits and losses. Each Member is responsible only for its own actions and no Member is an agent for any other Member. Members will not be jointly or severally liable for the actions of the other Members.
clauses.concern: The clause states that members will not be jointly or severally liable for the actions of the other members, but it lacks clarity on how capital calls and funding shortfalls are handled. This raises concerns about potential dilution of ownership and financial risks.

clauses.title: 61. Time
clauses.text: Time is of the essence in this Agreement.
clauses.concern: The clause states 'time is of the essence' but does not specify what deadlines are critical or how non-compliance will be addressed. This raises concerns about potential delays and lack of clarity on consequences for non-compliance.

clauses.title: 62. This Agreement
clauses.text: This Agreement may be executed in counterparts. Facsimile signatures are binding and are considered to be original signatures.
clauses.concern: The clause lacks clarity on how the joint venture will be funded and managed, particularly regarding capital calls, dilution mechanics, and liability structures. This raises concerns about potential financial risk and ownership dilution for the non-operator participant.

clauses.title: 63. Headings
clauses.text: Headings are inserted for the convenience of the Members only and are not to be considered when interpreting this Agreement. Words in the singular mean and include the plural and vice versa. Words in the masculine gender include the feminine gender and vice versa. Words in the neuter gender include the masculine gender and the feminine gender and vice versa.
clauses.concern: This clause defines headings as for convenience only, not for interpretation. This could lead to ambiguity in contract interpretation.

clauses.title: 64. If any
clauses.text: If any term, covenant, condition or provision of this Agreement is held by a court of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, void or unenforceable, it is the Members' intent that such provision be reduced in scope by the court only to the extent deemed necessary by that court to render the provision reasonable and enforceable and the remainder of the provisions of this Agreement will in no way be affected, impaired or invalidated as a result.
clauses.concern: This clause addresses the potential for invalidity of certain terms within the agreement and outlines how to modify them if necessary, but it doesn't directly address risk-related concerns like capital calls or liability.

clauses.title: 65. This Agreement
clauses.text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement between the Members. All negotiations and understandings have been included in this Agreement. Statements or representations which may have been made by any Member in the negotiation stages of this Agreement may in some way be inconsistent with this final written Agreement. All such statements are declared to be of no value in this Agreement. Only the written terms of this Agreement will bind the Members.
clauses.concern: This clause states that all prior negotiations and understandings are invalidated, potentially limiting negotiation rights and creating a risk of unforeseen consequences.

clauses.title: 66. This Agreement
clauses.text: This Agreement and the terms and conditions contained in this Agreement apply to and are binding upon the Member's successors, assigns, executors, administrators, beneficiaries, and representatives.
clauses.concern: The clause does not address specific risk concerns like capital calls, dilution mechanics, or liability.

clauses.title: 67. Any
clauses.text: Any notices or delivery required here will be deemed completed when hand-delivered, delivered by agent, or seven (7) days after being placed in the post, postage prepaid, to the Members at the addresses contained in this Agreement or as the Members may later designate in writing.
clauses.concern: This clause lacks clarity on how notices and delivery will be handled for critical JV matters such as capital calls, liability disputes, and operational changes. It also fails to specify a governing law or jurisdiction, which could lead to legal disputes and uncertainty in case of disagreements.

clauses.title: 68. All
clauses.text: All of the rights, remedies and benefits provided by this Agreement will be cumulative and will not be exclusive of any other such rights, remedies and benefits allowed by law.
clauses.concern: The clause states that all rights, remedies and benefits are cumulative. This could potentially lead to disputes regarding the allocation of rights and responsibilities.
